name: Conant Boat Access (South Fork Snake River)
notes: BLM concrete ramp + raft launch in Swan Valley; self-issue permit, $3 parking fee.

name: Byington Boat Access (South Fork Snake River)
notes: BLM ramp below the canyon reach; self-issue permit, $3 parking fee.

name: Lorenzo Boat Access (South Fork Snake River)
notes: Lower-river BLM launch near the US-20 crossing.

name: Menan Boat Access (South Fork Snake River)
notes: BLM take-out near the Henrys Fork confluence.

name: Red Road Bridge Boat Access (Henrys Fork)
notes: BLM access on the lower Henrys Fork west of Rexburg; coordinates approximate.
